publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-11-21 18:13:59 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Reports, speeches, job files, articles, publications, and a transcript of an interview.
did.abstract: Reports, speeches, job files, articles, and publications of Arthur Bohnen, concerning city and regional planning, housing, and urban renewal. Also, transcript of interview of Otar Aamodt, by Bohnen, 1977.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Member, International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, Ely Chapter.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Reports, speeches, job files, articles, and publications of Arthur Bohnen, concerning city and regional planning, housing, and urban renewal. Also, transcript of interview of Otar Aamodt, by Bohnen, 1977.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Reports (including feasability, rental market, and land demand studies)Boxes 1-2
Series II. Volunteer work for the International Executive Service CorpsBox 3
Series III. Publications by Bohnen and relating to his workBoxes 3-4, 8
Series IV. Subject files (speeches, clippings, notes)Boxes 4-5

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Arthur Bohnen papers, #3195. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Erection details - Modular walls & ext. walls
Materials furnished in basic package - Cliff-May Homes
Sen. Bill 2246 Maybank Amendment - AB comment
A Concept of a Home Building Organization ...
Some Comments on Housing for Chicago
Art Bohnen - Miscellaneous writings - Notes CBS
AB paper - Function of Acct. in Housing
Component Building Systems Ltd. by Arthur Bohnen
Urban renewal - Shopping center study - Ira Bach
Series VI. Lambda Alpha International files
